purpose: Document expected containment outcomes for Montgomery package validation without executing runtime code.

fixtures.description: Asset metadata identifies Montgomery County and GEOID 48339 only.
fixtures.expectedContainment: allowed within Montgomery implementation package; not visible to Liberty package or runtime activation paths.

fixtures.description: Asset metadata identifies Liberty County and a non-Montgomery GEOID only.
fixtures.expectedContainment: Montgomery validation must not claim or mutate Liberty assets.

fixtures.description: Asset coordinates or metadata approach the Montgomery/Liberty county interface but retain Montgomery ownership metadata.
fixtures.expectedContainment: accepted only when the protected Montgomery boundary reference supports Montgomery containment; Liberty remains isolated.

fixtures.description: Asset lies on or near a shared county boundary where ownership could be ambiguous.
fixtures.expectedContainment: no cross-county write or activation is allowed from an ambiguous shared-boundary condition.

fixtures.description: Asset omits county identifiers or contains county metadata outside the known package registry references.
fixtures.expectedContainment: asset is excluded from Montgomery and Liberty packages pending explicit county assignment.

fixtures.description: Asset is explicitly outside Montgomery County and not assigned to Liberty County.
fixtures.expectedContainment: no Montgomery ownership, no Liberty mutation, and no runtime activation.

fixtures.description: Package inventory references Montgomery County implementation artifacts only.
fixtures.expectedContainment: package ownership is documentary and does not create runtime or production registry records.

fixtures.description: Registry artifact reference describes Montgomery County ownership in package scope only.
fixtures.expectedContainment: registry evidence remains non-production and does not onboard or activate Montgomery.

fixtures.description: A read request is evaluated against documentary Montgomery package scope.
fixtures.expectedContainment: read expectations do not alter application runtime behavior or expose Liberty-only artifacts as Montgomery.

fixtures.description: A write request is evaluated against documentary Montgomery package scope.
fixtures.expectedContainment: no runtime write path, Supabase write, registry production write, or boundary mutation is authorized.

fixtures.description: Awareness/intelligence behavior references are reviewed only as protected systems.
fixtures.expectedContainment: no historical systems, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, awareness filtering, hazards, alerts, or sync behavior is enabled.
